name: MiniMax Music 2.6
description: MiniMax's music generation model that creates full-length songs with vocals from text prompts and lyrics, or instrumental tracks. Supports BPM/key control and auto-generated lyrics.

examples.name: Simple Prompt
examples.description: Generate music from a style description with auto-generated lyrics

input.prompt: An upbeat electronic dance track with a catchy synth melody and driving beat

code_snippets.label: typescript
curl

examples.name: With Lyrics
examples.description: Generate a song with custom lyrics

input.prompt: A warm acoustic folk ballad with fingerpicked guitar and gentle vocals
input.lyrics:
Walking down a dusty road
With the sunset painting gold
Every step a story told
Of the places I call home

code_snippets.label: typescript
curl
